zh.Bengeworth, Eveshamboro, Worcestershire,: 英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾本沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth 於1479年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾本沃斯時，她的父親Geoffrey Bretagne29歲，母親Hedwig Hawise21歲。她於1516年5月6日與John Washbourne在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾本沃斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1547年5月13日在她的家鄉享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾本沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Emme
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Emma  ,   Emily  , and related names, now used increasingly as an independent given name.

variants.name: Emmy
meanings: Pet form of   Emma  ,   Emily  , and related names, now used increasingly as an independent given name.

nameMeanings.name: Brittany
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly North American: modern coinage, taken from the traditionally Celtic-speaking region of north-west France, known in medieval Latin as Britannia, because it was settled by refugees from Cornwall and Devon following the establishment of the Anglo-Saxon kingdom of Wessex. Its adoption as a given name has also been influenced by Britt , of which it is sometimes regarded as the full form. In recent years it has rapidly established itself as a popular name in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth  was born in 1479, in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Geoffrey Bretagne, was 29 and her mother, Hedwig Hawise, was 21. She married John Washbourne on 6 May 1516, in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 13 May 1547, in her hometown, at the age of 68, and was buried in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth  est née en 1479, à Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey Bretagne, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Hedwig Hawise, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John Washbourne le 6 mai 1516, à Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 mai 1547, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth  1479 in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey Bretagne 29 und ihre Mutter Hedwig Hawise 21. Sie hat am 6. Mai 1516 in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom John Washbourne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. Mai 1547 im Alter von 68 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth  è nata il nel 1479 nel Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Geoffrey Bretagne, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Hedwig Hawise, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato John Washbourne il 6 maggio 1516, nel Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 maggio 1547, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth (이)가 1479년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 벤그워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey Bretagne(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hedwig Hawise(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1516년 5월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 벤그워스에서 John Washbourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1547년 5월 13일 그녀의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 벤그워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth  nasceu em 1479, em Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geoffrey Bretagne, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Hedwig Hawise, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com John Washbourne em 6 de maio de 1516, em Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de maio de 1547, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Emme Brittany Bengeworth  родилась в 1479 г. в местности бенгюорт, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Geoffrey Bretagne было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Hedwig Hawise, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Washbourne 6 мая 1516 г. в местности бенгюорт, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 13 мая 1547 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности бенгюорт, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con John Washbourne el 6 de mayo de 1516, en Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas.
